en.name: Crossover Snake with Pass-Out Trigger
en.description: Set five cones in a 1.5 m offset zig-zag corridor spanning 12 m. The point guard attacks each cone with a live dribble at game speed, executing a tight crossover at the outside edge while keeping the chest vertical and eyes locked on a coach stationed at the baseline. On a hand signal at any cone, the athlete plants the outside foot, decelerates in two steps, and fires a hook or push pass to the signaled side. The drill welds tight-space handle mechanics to decision latency, replicating pick-and-roll traffic where the lead guard must redirect and distribute without telegraphing.
cues: Ball crosses below the knee — chest stays tall
Plant the outside edge, nose behind toes
Eyes up — read the trigger before the cone

es.name: Serpiente de cruces con pase reactivo
es.description: Coloca cinco conos en un corredor zigzag de 12 m con desfase de 1.5 m. El base ataca cada cono con bote vivo a velocidad de juego, ejecutando un cruce cerrado en el borde externo mientras mantiene el pecho vertical y los ojos fijos en un entrenador situado en la línea de fondo. Ante una señal de mano en cualquier cono, el atleta planta el pie externo, desacelera en dos pasos y lanza un pase de gancho o de pecho hacia el lado señalado. El ejercicio fusiona la mecánica del manejo en espacios reducidos con la latencia de decisión, replicando el tráfico del pick-and-roll donde el base debe redirigir y distribuir sin telegrafiar.
cues: El balón cruza por debajo de la rodilla — pecho erguido
Planta el borde externo, nariz detrás de los dedos
Ojos arriba — lee la señal antes del cono

pt.name: Serpente de crossovers com passe reativo
pt.description: Posicione cinco cones em um corredor em zigue-zague de 12 m com desvio de 1,5 m. O armador ataca cada cone com drible vivo em velocidade de jogo, executando um crossover curto na borda externa enquanto mantém o peito vertical e os olhos travados em um treinador posicionado na linha de fundo. Ao sinal de mão em qualquer cone, o atleta crava o pé externo, desacelera em dois passos e dispara um passe de gancho ou de peito para o lado sinalizado. O exercício solda a mecânica de controle de bola em espaço curto à latência de decisão, replicando o tráfego do pick-and-roll em que o armador precisa redirecionar e distribuir sem telegrafar.
cues: A bola cruza abaixo do joelho — peito ereto
Crave a borda externa do pé, nariz atrás dos dedos
Olhos para cima — leia o sinal antes do cone

biomechanics.force_vector: Frontal Plane/Lateral with Transverse Plane re-acceleration
friction_flags: ACL rotational shear on plant
High ankle inversion stress at cone edge
Patellar tendon eccentric spike during two-step deceleration

youth_8_12.objective: Groove crossover rhythm and a safe outside-foot plant pattern at sub-maximal speed
youth_8_12.prescription: 3 sets x 4 corridor passes (60% speed), walk-back recovery

scholastic_13_15.objective: Hold handle quality while introducing the live visual trigger and two-step deceleration
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 4 sets x 4 corridor passes (80% speed), 1:3 work-to-rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Game-speed redirection with randomized trigger cones and zero telegraph on the pass-out
high_school_16_18.prescription: 5 sets x 4 corridor passes (100% speed), randomized signal cone, 1:4 work-to-rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite decision latency under load — compressed corridors, weighted ball, and dual-task audio calls
collegiate_pro.prescription: 6 sets x 4 passes with 10% weighted ball, laser-timed 12 m splits, mid-rep verbal call-out task

en.name: Defensive Mirror Box React
en.description: Mark a 3 x 3 m box at the top of the key. A rabbit attacker performs unscripted lateral cuts and stutters inside the box while the point guard mirrors in a defensive slide, maintaining arm-length spacing and a low athletic stance without crossing the feet. On the whistle, the guard explodes into a high-hand closeout to a marked shooter spot, chopping the final two steps. The drill builds perception-action coupling for on-ball pressure, training the guard to move off hip cues rather than ball fakes.
cues: Hips below shoulders — slide, never cross
Push the floor away with the trail leg
High hand on the closeout — chop the last two steps

es.name: Espejo defensivo reactivo en caja
es.description: Marca una caja de 3 x 3 m en la parte alta de la zona. Un atacante liebre realiza cortes laterales y amagues no guionados dentro de la caja mientras el base lo refleja con desplazamiento defensivo, manteniendo la distancia de un brazo y una postura atlética baja sin cruzar los pies. Al silbato, el base explota hacia un closeout con mano alta hasta un punto de tirador marcado, picando los dos últimos pasos. El ejercicio construye el acople percepción-acción para la presión al balón, entrenando al base a moverse según las caderas del rival y no según las fintas de balón.
cues: Caderas debajo de los hombros — desliza, nunca cruces
Empuja el suelo con la pierna trasera
Mano alta en el closeout — pica los dos últimos pasos

pt.name: Espelho defensivo reativo no quadrado
pt.description: Demarque um quadrado de 3 x 3 m no topo do garrafão. Um atacante coelho executa cortes laterais e fintas não roteirizadas dentro do quadrado enquanto o armador o espelha em deslocamento defensivo, mantendo distância de um braço e postura atlética baixa sem cruzar os pés. No apito, o armador explode em um closeout de mão alta até um ponto de arremessador demarcado, picotando os dois últimos passos. O exercício constrói o acoplamento percepção-ação para pressão na bola, treinando o armador a se mover pelos quadris do adversário e não pelas fintas de bola.
cues: Quadril abaixo dos ombros — deslize, nunca cruze
Empurre o chão com a perna de trás
Mão alta no closeout — picote os dois últimos passos

biomechanics.force_vector: Frontal Plane/Lateral
friction_flags: Groin and adductor eccentric strain in lateral push-off
High ankle inversion stress on reactive cuts
Patellofemoral compression in sustained low stance

youth_8_12.objective: Own a stable defensive stance and clean lateral slide without foot crossing
youth_8_12.prescription: 4 sets x 10 seconds mirrored slides (50% intensity), 60 s rest

scholastic_13_15.objective: Track an unscripted rabbit while holding spacing discipline and stance height
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 5 sets x 12 seconds live mirror, 45 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Compress reaction latency and finish every rep with a violent, controlled closeout
high_school_16_18.prescription: 6 sets x 15 seconds live mirror plus whistle closeout, 1:4 work-to-rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Sustain elite mirror quality under cognitive load with multi-signal closeout targets
collegiate_pro.prescription: 8 sets x 15 seconds with colored-cone closeout calls, light band around hips for resisted slide, full recovery

en.name: Pin-Down Curl Catch-and-Rise
en.description: The shooting guard starts on the block, sprints off a simulated pin-down screen frame, and curls hard toward the slot. A passer delivers the ball into the curl window; the guard executes an inside-foot hop gather, loading the hips rather than the knees, and rises vertically into a shot without lateral drift. The drill converts horizontal sprint momentum into vertical shot power, which is the core energy-transfer problem of every movement shooter coming off screens.
cues: Snap the curl tight off the screen shoulder
Land the gather loaded — hips, not knees
Rise on one line — no drift at the top

es.name: Curl en pin-down con recepción y elevación
es.description: El escolta parte del poste bajo, esprinta alrededor de una estructura de bloqueo pin-down simulada y realiza un curl agresivo hacia el slot. Un pasador entrega el balón en la ventana del curl; el escolta ejecuta una recogida con salto sobre el pie interno, cargando las caderas y no las rodillas, y se eleva verticalmente al tiro sin deriva lateral. El ejercicio convierte el impulso horizontal del sprint en potencia vertical de tiro, el problema central de transferencia de energía de todo tirador en movimiento que sale de bloqueos.
cues: Cierra el curl pegado al hombro del bloqueo
Aterriza la recogida cargado — caderas, no rodillas
Elévate en una sola línea — sin deriva arriba

pt.name: Curl no pin-down com recepção e subida
pt.description: O ala-armador parte do garrafão, acelera ao redor de uma estrutura de bloqueio pin-down simulada e faz um curl agressivo em direção ao slot. Um passador entrega a bola na janela do curl; o atleta executa uma recepção com hop sobre o pé interno, carregando os quadris e não os joelhos, e sobe verticalmente para o arremesso sem deriva lateral. O exercício converte o impulso horizontal do sprint em potência vertical de arremesso, o problema central de transferência de energia de todo arremessador em movimento que sai de bloqueios.
cues: Feche o curl colado no ombro do bloqueio
Aterrisse a recepção carregado — quadris, não joelhos
Suba em uma linha só — sem deriva no topo

biomechanics.force_vector: Sagittal Plane/Linear converted to vertical impulse with Transverse curl entry
friction_flags: Patellar tendon load on hop gather
Knee valgus collapse risk on curl plant
Achilles reactive stiffness demand on short ground contact

youth_8_12.objective: Learn the hop gather footwork pattern and balanced vertical rise at jogging speed
youth_8_12.prescription: 3 sets x 5 curls (50% speed, no defender frame), full recovery

scholastic_13_15.objective: Connect sprint entry to a loaded gather with consistent shot-line balance
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 4 sets x 5 curls (75% speed), 60 s between sets

high_school_16_18.objective: Game-speed curls with contested-window timing and zero energy leak at the top
high_school_16_18.prescription: 5 sets x 6 curls at full speed with late pass delivery, 1:3 work-to-rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite repeatability under fatigue — made-shot quotas with tracked rise time and randomized pass height
collegiate_pro.prescription: 6 sets x 6 curls with make quota (4 of 6), laser-timed gather-to-release under 0.8 s, randomized pass placement

en.name: Full-Speed Stride-Stop into Shot Pocket
en.description: From the opposite baseline, the shooting guard sprints three-quarter court at maximal velocity toward a marked arc spot. Entering the final 3 m, the athlete executes a two-step stride stop, absorbing force heel-to-ball through flexed hips and finishing motionless in the shot pocket with the chest tall. A coach grades stop quality: silent feet, no forward drift, knees tracking the toe line. This is pure eccentric braking strength packaged in the exact context a two-guard uses it — sprinting into transition pull-ups.
cues: Brake in two — heel-to-ball roll
Drop the hips, not the chest
Stick it silent — quiet feet, loud shot

es.name: Frenado en dos tiempos a bolsillo de tiro
es.description: Desde la línea de fondo opuesta, el escolta esprinta tres cuartos de cancha a velocidad máxima hacia un punto marcado del arco. Al entrar en los últimos 3 m, el atleta ejecuta una parada en dos tiempos, absorbiendo la fuerza de talón a metatarso con caderas flexionadas y terminando inmóvil en el bolsillo de tiro con el pecho erguido. Un entrenador califica la calidad de la parada: pies silenciosos, sin deriva hacia adelante, rodillas alineadas con los dedos. Es fuerza de frenado excéntrica pura empaquetada en el contexto exacto del escolta: esprintar hacia tiros de transición.
cues: Frena en dos — rueda de talón a metatarso
Baja las caderas, no el pecho
Clávala en silencio — pies callados, tiro fuerte

pt.name: Freada em dois tempos para o bolso de arremesso
pt.description: Da linha de fundo oposta, o ala-armador acelera três quartos de quadra em velocidade máxima até um ponto demarcado do perímetro. Ao entrar nos 3 m finais, o atleta executa uma parada em dois tempos, absorvendo a força do calcanhar ao metatarso com quadris flexionados e terminando imóvel no bolso de arremesso com o peito alto. Um treinador avalia a qualidade da parada: pés silenciosos, sem deriva à frente, joelhos alinhados com os dedos. É pura força de frenagem excêntrica embalada no contexto exato do ala — acelerar para arremessos de transição.
cues: Freie em dois — rolando do calcanhar ao metatarso
Desça os quadris, não o peito
Crave em silêncio — pés quietos, arremesso forte

biomechanics.force_vector: Sagittal Plane/Linear with dominant eccentric braking component
friction_flags: Patellar tendon eccentric spike on first brake step
ACL anterior shear under high-velocity stop
Eccentric hamstring loading during terminal stride

youth_8_12.objective: Pattern the two-step stop from a jog with hips absorbing and chest tall
youth_8_12.prescription: 4 reps x 15 m (50% speed), walk-back recovery

scholastic_13_15.objective: Stick clean stops from striding speed with zero forward drift
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 6 reps x 20 m (75% speed), 75 s rest between reps

high_school_16_18.objective: Absorb true sprint velocity into a motionless shot pocket on every rep
high_school_16_18.prescription: 8 reps x three-quarter court (95-100% speed), coach-graded stops, full recovery

collegiate_pro.objective: Maximal-velocity braking with live shot finish and objective stop metrics
collegiate_pro.prescription: 10 reps full speed with laser-timed final 5 m, force-plate or jump-mat stop audit, live pull-up finish on last 5 reps

en.name: Pad-Contact Finishing Ladder
en.description: The forward receives the ball at the elbow or short corner and attacks downhill. At the second step of the drive, a coach delivers escalating contact with a blocking pad — first a brush, then a bump, then a full shoulder check across rounds. The athlete must absorb the hit through a braced trunk, maintain the dribble-to-gather sequence, and finish with either hand off two feet. The ladder format progressively overloads contact tolerance, building the through-contact finishing that defines combo forwards in traffic.
cues: Chest through the pad — own the bump
Load two feet on contact finishes
Eyes on the square, never on the pad

es.name: Escalera de finalización con contacto de almohadilla
es.description: El alero recibe el balón en el codo de la zona o en la esquina corta y ataca hacia el aro. En el segundo paso de la penetración, un entrenador aplica contacto creciente con una almohadilla de bloqueo: primero un roce, luego un empujón y después un choque de hombro completo a lo largo de las rondas. El atleta debe absorber el golpe con el tronco firme, mantener la secuencia de bote a recogida y finalizar con cualquier mano desde dos pies. El formato de escalera sobrecarga progresivamente la tolerancia al contacto, construyendo la finalización a través del contacto que define a los aleros en el tráfico.
cues: Pecho a través de la almohadilla — adueñate del golpe
Carga dos pies en las finalizaciones con contacto
Ojos en el cuadro del tablero, nunca en la almohadilla

pt.name: Escada de finalização com contato no aparador
pt.description: O ala recebe a bola no cotovelo do garrafão ou no canto curto e ataca em direção ao aro. No segundo passo da infiltração, um treinador aplica contato crescente com um aparador de bloqueio: primeiro um roçar, depois um empurrão e então um choque de ombro completo ao longo das rodadas. O atleta deve absorver o impacto com o tronco firme, manter a sequência de drible e recepção e finalizar com qualquer mão saindo de dois pés. O formato em escada sobrecarrega progressivamente a tolerância ao contato, construindo a finalização através do contato que define os alas no tráfego.
cues: Peito através do aparador — seja dono do choque
Carregue os dois pés nas finalizações com contato
Olhos no quadrado da tabela, nunca no aparador

biomechanics.force_vector: Sagittal Plane/Linear with external perturbation absorption
friction_flags: AC joint compression on shoulder contact
Knee valgus collapse under mid-drive perturbation
Lumbar flexion-compression under braced impact

youth_8_12.objective: Finish off two feet with balance — contact limited to a light pad brush
youth_8_12.prescription: 3 sets x 4 finishes per hand (brush contact only), full recovery

scholastic_13_15.objective: Hold the gather sequence through a moderate bump without travel violations
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 4 sets x 4 finishes per hand (bump-level contact), 60 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Convert through full shoulder checks at game speed with either hand
high_school_16_18.prescription: 5 sets x 5 finishes alternating hands (full pad check), make quota 3 of 5, 1:3 work-to-rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite contact balance — randomized contact timing, double-pad traffic, and conversion percentage tracking
collegiate_pro.prescription: 6 sets x 5 finishes with two pad holders and randomized strike timing, 70% conversion target, video-audited trunk lean

en.name: High-Low Flash Cut Series
en.description: Cones mark the wing, short corner, and high post. The forward chains planted V-cuts between the three stations — selling low before flashing high, ripping through each direction change off the outside foot, and presenting target hands the instant separation is created. A passer feeds the ball at unpredictable stations; the forward catches, chins the ball, and resets. The drill trains the angular cutting economy and plant-leg integrity that frees forwards against denial defense.
cues: Sell low before you flash high
Plant the outside foot — rip through the cut
Show target hands the moment you separate

es.name: Serie de cortes flash alto-bajo
es.description: Los conos marcan el ala, la esquina corta y el poste alto. El alero encadena cortes en V con pie plantado entre las tres estaciones: finge ir abajo antes de aparecer arriba, rompe cada cambio de dirección desde el pie externo y presenta las manos objetivo en el instante en que crea separación. Un pasador entrega el balón en estaciones impredecibles; el alero recibe, protege el balón bajo la barbilla y reinicia. El ejercicio entrena la economía de corte angular y la integridad de la pierna de apoyo que libera a los aleros contra defensas de negación.
cues: Finge abajo antes de aparecer arriba
Planta el pie externo — rompe el corte
Muestra las manos objetivo en cuanto te separes

pt.name: Série de cortes flash alto-baixo
pt.description: Cones demarcam a ala, o canto curto e o poste alto. O ala encadeia cortes em V com pé cravado entre as três estações — vende o corte baixo antes de aparecer no alto, rompe cada mudança de direção a partir do pé externo e apresenta as mãos-alvo no instante em que cria separação. Um passador entrega a bola em estações imprevisíveis; o ala recebe, protege a bola no queixo e reinicia. O exercício treina a economia de corte angular e a integridade da perna de apoio que liberta os alas contra defesas de negação.
cues: Venda o corte baixo antes de aparecer no alto
Crave o pé externo — rompa o corte
Mostre as mãos-alvo no momento da separação

biomechanics.force_vector: Multi-planar with dominant Frontal Plane/Lateral plant loading
friction_flags: ACL rotational shear on hard V-cut plant
High ankle inversion stress on outside-foot push
Adductor eccentric strain on directional rip

youth_8_12.objective: Learn the V-cut shape and outside-foot plant without ball delivery pressure
youth_8_12.prescription: 3 sets x 6 cuts (60% speed, no passer), full walk recovery

scholastic_13_15.objective: Time cuts to a live passer and catch with protected ball position
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 4 sets x 6 cuts with feeds (75% speed), 60 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Create real separation at game speed against a token denial defender
high_school_16_18.prescription: 5 sets x 8 cuts versus guided denial, full-speed plants, 1:3 work-to-rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite cut economy under randomized feeds, live denial, and step-count constraints
collegiate_pro.prescription: 6 sets x 8 cuts versus live denial with three-step separation constraint, randomized station order, GPS or video cut-angle audit

en.name: Drop-Step Seal and Vertical Punch
en.description: The center establishes a low-post seal against a coach holding a contact pad, sits weight into the defender to feel the leverage line, then receives the entry pass. The athlete executes a long drop-step toward the baseline, toes finishing pointed at the rim, and punches vertically off two feet to finish above the pad pressure. The drill marries seal strength, hip torque on the drop-step, and bilateral vertical force — the non-negotiable power chain of interior scoring.
cues: Sit the seal — make him feel your weight
Long drop-step, toes to the rim
Punch off two — rim-high hands

es.name: Sello con drop-step y despegue vertical
es.description: El pívot establece un sello en el poste bajo contra un entrenador con almohadilla de contacto, asienta su peso sobre el defensor para sentir la línea de palanca y luego recibe el pase interior. El atleta ejecuta un drop-step largo hacia la línea de fondo, con los dedos del pie terminando apuntados al aro, y despega verticalmente desde dos pies para finalizar por encima de la presión de la almohadilla. El ejercicio une la fuerza del sello, el torque de cadera en el drop-step y la fuerza vertical bilateral: la cadena de potencia innegociable del anotador interior.
cues: Asienta el sello — que sienta tu peso
Drop-step largo, dedos al aro
Despega desde dos pies — manos a la altura del aro

pt.name: Selo com drop-step e impulsão vertical
pt.description: O pivô estabelece um selo no garrafão contra um treinador com aparador de contato, assenta o peso sobre o defensor para sentir a linha de alavanca e então recebe o passe interior. O atleta executa um drop-step longo em direção à linha de fundo, com os dedos do pé terminando apontados para o aro, e sobe verticalmente saindo de dois pés para finalizar acima da pressão do aparador. O exercício une a força do selo, o torque de quadril no drop-step e a força vertical bilateral — a cadeia de potência inegociável do pontuador interior.
cues: Assente o selo — faça-o sentir seu peso
Drop-step longo, dedos para o aro
Suba de dois pés — mãos na altura do aro

biomechanics.force_vector: Transverse Plane/Rotational entry into vertical Sagittal impulse
friction_flags: Lumbar extension-rotation coupling stress under seal load
Patellar tendon load on bilateral punch
AC joint compression against pad pressure

youth_8_12.objective: Learn drop-step footwork geometry and two-foot finish with no contact load
youth_8_12.prescription: 3 sets x 5 drop-steps per side (no pad), full recovery

scholastic_13_15.objective: Hold a legal seal against light pad pressure and finish balanced
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 4 sets x 5 drop-steps per side (light pad), 60 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Convert through real pad resistance with rim-level finish intent every rep
high_school_16_18.prescription: 5 sets x 6 drop-steps alternating sides (full pad press), make quota 4 of 6, 1:3 work-to-rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite interior power — weighted vest seal work, second-jump finishes, and jump-height tracking
collegiate_pro.prescription: 6 sets x 6 reps with 5-8% weighted vest, mandatory second-jump putback on coach call, jump-mat height audit

en.name: Rim-Run Brake-and-Wall-Up
en.description: The center sprints a full-court rim run at maximal velocity, targeting the front of the restricted area. Entering the lane, the athlete executes a three-step chop brake — progressively longer ground contacts that bleed momentum — and finishes in a vertical wall-up: chest tall, arms extended ceiling-high, zero forward travel. Big athletes carry enormous momentum; this drill teaches them to kill it without knee collapse or charging contact, protecting both the joint and the possession.
cues: Chop the brake — three falling steps to zero
Knees track the toe line on the stop
Wall up tall — chest vertical, arms to the ceiling

es.name: Carrera al aro con frenado y verticalidad
es.description: El pívot esprinta una carrera al aro de cancha completa a velocidad máxima, apuntando al frente del área restringida. Al entrar en la zona, el atleta ejecuta un frenado picado de tres pasos —contactos con el suelo progresivamente más largos que drenan el impulso— y termina en una verticalidad total: pecho erguido, brazos extendidos al techo, cero desplazamiento hacia adelante. Los atletas grandes cargan un impulso enorme; este ejercicio les enseña a eliminarlo sin colapso de rodilla ni contacto de carga ofensiva, protegiendo la articulación y la posesión.
cues: Pica el frenado — tres pasos descendentes hasta cero
Las rodillas siguen la línea de los dedos al frenar
Verticalidad total — pecho erguido, brazos al techo

pt.name: Corrida ao aro com freada e verticalidade
pt.description: O pivô faz uma corrida ao aro de quadra inteira em velocidade máxima, mirando a frente da área restritiva. Ao entrar no garrafão, o atleta executa uma freada picotada de três passos — contatos com o solo progressivamente mais longos que drenam o impulso — e termina em verticalidade total: peito alto, braços estendidos ao teto, zero deslocamento à frente. Atletas grandes carregam um impulso enorme; este exercício os ensina a anulá-lo sem colapso do joelho nem falta de ataque, protegendo a articulação e a posse de bola.
cues: Picote a freada — três passos decrescentes até zero
Joelhos seguem a linha dos dedos na parada
Verticalidade total — peito ereto, braços ao teto

biomechanics.force_vector: Sagittal Plane/Linear with maximal eccentric braking demand
friction_flags: Patellar tendon eccentric spike under high body-mass braking
ACL anterior shear on first chop step
Achilles loading under tall-mass deceleration

youth_8_12.objective: Pattern the three-step chop from a half-court jog with tall finish posture
youth_8_12.prescription: 4 reps x half court (50% speed), walk-back recovery

scholastic_13_15.objective: Brake from striding speed with knees tracking and zero charge drift
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 5 reps x three-quarter court (75% speed), 90 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Kill full sprint momentum inside the lane with a legal vertical wall-up every rep
high_school_16_18.prescription: 6 reps x full court (95-100% speed), coach-graded stop and wall-up, full recovery

collegiate_pro.objective: Maximal-mass braking with contested finish decisions and objective deceleration metrics
collegiate_pro.prescription: 8 reps full court with laser-timed final 10 m deceleration window, random coach call to wall-up or lob finish, force-audit on stop quality

en.name: Drop-Back Rotational Med-Ball Rip
en.description: From a simulated center exchange, the quarterback executes a clean five-step drop, hitches once, and rips a 3-4 kg medicine ball to a wall target at throwing height. The movement must replicate the passing sequence: back foot stabs the ground, hips fire toward the target while the torso stays closed, then the trunk whips through as the ball releases. The drill overloads hip-shoulder separation and ground-force transfer — the engine of throwing velocity — without accumulating throwing-arm volume.
cues: Back foot stabs — hips fire first
Stay closed upstairs while the hips fly
Finish flat — chest over the target line

es.name: Lanzamiento rotacional de balón medicinal tras drop-back
es.description: Desde un intercambio simulado con el centro, el mariscal ejecuta un drop de cinco pasos limpio, da un hitch y lanza con violencia un balón medicinal de 3-4 kg contra un objetivo en la pared a la altura del pase. El movimiento debe replicar la secuencia de lanzamiento: el pie trasero clava el suelo, las caderas disparan hacia el objetivo mientras el torso permanece cerrado, y luego el tronco se desata al soltar el balón. El ejercicio sobrecarga la separación cadera-hombro y la transferencia de fuerza del suelo —el motor de la velocidad de pase— sin acumular volumen en el brazo de lanzamiento.
cues: El pie trasero clava — las caderas disparan primero
Mantén el torso cerrado mientras las caderas vuelan
Termina plano — pecho sobre la línea del objetivo

pt.name: Arremesso rotacional de medicine ball após drop-back
pt.description: A partir de uma troca simulada com o center, o quarterback executa um drop limpo de cinco passos, dá um hitch e dispara uma medicine ball de 3-4 kg contra um alvo na parede na altura do passe. O movimento deve replicar a sequência do lançamento: o pé de trás finca o chão, os quadris disparam em direção ao alvo enquanto o tronco permanece fechado, e então o tronco chicoteia na soltura da bola. O exercício sobrecarrega a separação quadril-ombro e a transferência de força do solo — o motor da velocidade de passe — sem acumular volume no braço de lançamento.
cues: O pé de trás finca — os quadris disparam primeiro
Tronco fechado enquanto os quadris voam
Finalize plano — peito sobre a linha do alvo

biomechanics.force_vector: Transverse Plane/Rotational over a Sagittal drop entry
friction_flags: Lumbar extension-rotation coupling stress at release
Lead-hip internal rotation demand on block
Shoulder anterior capsule load if torso opens early

youth_8_12.objective: Learn the drop rhythm and hip-first throwing order with a light ball
youth_8_12.prescription: 3 sets x 5 throws (1-2 kg ball, three-step drop), full recovery

scholastic_13_15.objective: Connect a clean five-step drop to sequenced hip-then-torso delivery
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 4 sets x 5 throws (2-3 kg ball), 60 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Maximal-intent separation throws with consistent footwork timing under a play clock
high_school_16_18.prescription: 5 sets x 4 throws (3-4 kg ball) on a 6 s simulated clock, 1:4 work-to-rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite ground-force transfer — velocity-tracked throws with randomized protection calls and movement variance
collegiate_pro.prescription: 6 sets x 4 throws with radar or velocity-app tracking, random call to climb or roll before release, target-zone accuracy quota

en.name: Pocket Escape Color React
en.description: The quarterback works inside a 4 x 4 yd pocket marked by four colored cones representing rush lanes. A coach flashes colors in random order; each color demands a specific pocket answer — climb, slide left, slide right, or escape and reset. Throughout every movement the quarterback keeps two hands on the ball and eyes downfield, calling out the jersey numbers a second coach holds up. The drill separates pocket movement from panic, training subtle, balanced relocations while the eyes never leave the read progression.
cues: Two hands on the ball through traffic
Climb with level eyes — never bail blind
Reset your base before every throw window

es.name: Escape de pocket con reacción a colores
es.description: El mariscal trabaja dentro de un pocket de 4 x 4 yardas marcado por cuatro conos de colores que representan carriles de presión. Un entrenador muestra colores en orden aleatorio; cada color exige una respuesta específica del pocket: subir, deslizarse a la izquierda, deslizarse a la derecha, o escapar y reiniciar. Durante todo movimiento, el mariscal mantiene las dos manos en el balón y los ojos al fondo del campo, cantando los números que un segundo entrenador levanta. El ejercicio separa el movimiento de pocket del pánico, entrenando reubicaciones sutiles y equilibradas mientras los ojos nunca abandonan la progresión de lectura.
cues: Dos manos en el balón entre el tráfico
Sube con los ojos nivelados — nunca huyas a ciegas
Reinicia tu base antes de cada ventana de pase

pt.name: Escape do pocket com reação a cores
pt.description: O quarterback trabalha dentro de um pocket de 4 x 4 jardas marcado por quatro cones coloridos que representam corredores de pressão. Um treinador exibe cores em ordem aleatória; cada cor exige uma resposta específica do pocket — subir, deslizar à esquerda, deslizar à direita, ou escapar e reiniciar. Durante todo movimento, o quarterback mantém as duas mãos na bola e os olhos no fundo do campo, cantando os números que um segundo treinador levanta. O exercício separa o movimento de pocket do pânico, treinando realocações sutis e equilibradas enquanto os olhos nunca abandonam a progressão de leitura.
cues: Duas mãos na bola no meio do tráfego
Suba com os olhos nivelados — nunca fuja às cegas
Reposicione a base antes de cada janela de passe

biomechanics.force_vector: Multi-planar with short Frontal and Sagittal repositioning bursts
friction_flags: Ankle inversion stress on blind lateral slides
Patellofemoral load in repeated micro-decelerations
Hip flexor strain on abrupt climb accelerations

youth_8_12.objective: Learn the four pocket answers as clean, balanced footwork patterns
youth_8_12.prescription: 4 sets x 12 seconds scripted color order (50% tempo), 60 s rest

scholastic_13_15.objective: Answer random colors without ball dip or eye drop
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 5 sets x 15 seconds random colors, 45 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Compress reaction time while sustaining downfield number call-outs every rep
high_school_16_18.prescription: 6 sets x 18 seconds random colors plus number reads, 1:3 work-to-rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite pocket poise — dual-task overload with live rush dummies, audio cadence, and throw finish
collegiate_pro.prescription: 8 sets x 20 seconds with two live bag rushers, audible-changing cadence call, finish on a live throw to the called number

en.name: Press-Release Stem Acceleration
en.description: Against a coach holding a hand shield in press alignment, the receiver executes a foot-fire release — split, swipe, and win the edge — then immediately stems vertical through a 30 m acceleration build to maximum velocity, staying on top of an imaginary route line. The drill stitches the dirty, combative first two yards of a release to clean upright sprint mechanics, teaching receivers to reclaim speed instantly after contact instead of drifting laterally and dying off the line.
cues: Win the hip line in three steps
Stack him — get back on top of the route
Run through the catch point, never to it

es.name: Aceleración de stem tras liberación de press
es.description: Contra un entrenador con escudo de mano en alineación de press, el receptor ejecuta una liberación con pies rápidos —split, manotazo y ganar el borde— y de inmediato asciende vertical en una construcción de aceleración de 30 m hasta velocidad máxima, manteniéndose encima de la línea de ruta imaginaria. El ejercicio cose las dos primeras yardas combativas de una liberación con una mecánica de sprint erguida y limpia, enseñando a los receptores a recuperar velocidad al instante después del contacto en lugar de derivar lateralmente y morir en la línea.
cues: Gana la línea de cadera en tres pasos
Apílalo — vuelve a la cima de la ruta
Corre a través del punto de recepción, nunca hacia él

pt.name: Aceleração de stem após liberação do press
pt.description: Contra um treinador com escudo de mão em alinhamento de press, o recebedor executa uma liberação com pés rápidos — split, tapa e ganhar a borda — e imediatamente sobe vertical em uma construção de aceleração de 30 m até a velocidade máxima, permanecendo no topo da linha de rota imaginária. O exercício costura as duas primeiras jardas combativas de uma liberação à mecânica de sprint ereta e limpa, ensinando recebedores a recuperar velocidade instantaneamente após o contato em vez de derivar lateralmente e morrer na linha.
cues: Vença a linha do quadril em três passos
Empilhe o defensor — volte ao topo da rota
Corra através do ponto de recepção, nunca até ele

biomechanics.force_vector: Sagittal Plane/Linear with brief Frontal contact deflection
friction_flags: Eccentric hamstring loading approaching top speed
Shoulder contact stress during swipe engagement
Calf-Achilles overload in repeated max accelerations

youth_8_12.objective: Learn the split-swipe release shape and tall acceleration posture without contact
youth_8_12.prescription: 4 reps x 15 m (60% speed, air release), walk-back recovery

scholastic_13_15.objective: Beat a passive shield and rebuild sprint posture within five steps
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 6 reps x 20 m (80% speed, passive shield), 90 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Win live press looks and carry true max velocity through 30 m
high_school_16_18.prescription: 6 reps x 30 m (95-100% speed, active shield), full recovery 2-3 min

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite release-to-speed conversion — timed splits, randomized leverage, and contested catch finish
collegiate_pro.prescription: 8 reps x 30 m with laser timing at 10 and 30 m, randomized inside-outside press leverage, over-shoulder catch finish on final 4 reps

en.name: Snap-Down Route Break Series
en.description: Cones mark break points at 10 and 12 yards for comeback, dig, and curl stems. The receiver sprints each stem at route speed, sinks the hips entering the final two steps, and snaps down into the break — chest over knee, elbow ripping back to accelerate the turn — then bursts flat out of the cut to a catch spot. Every break is graded on step count and exit speed. The drill builds the deceleration-to-separation mechanism that turns straight-line speed into open windows.
cues: Sink through the break — chest over knee
Throw the elbow back to snap the turn
Burst flat — lose him on the second step

es.name: Serie de quiebres de ruta con frenado seco
es.description: Los conos marcan puntos de quiebre a 10 y 12 yardas para rutas comeback, dig y curl. El receptor esprinta cada stem a velocidad de ruta, hunde las caderas al entrar en los dos últimos pasos y frena seco en el quiebre —pecho sobre rodilla, codo tirando hacia atrás para acelerar el giro— y luego explota plano fuera del corte hacia un punto de recepción. Cada quiebre se califica por número de pasos y velocidad de salida. El ejercicio construye el mecanismo de desaceleración-separación que convierte la velocidad lineal en ventanas abiertas.
cues: Húndete en el quiebre — pecho sobre rodilla
Tira el codo atrás para azotar el giro
Explota plano — piérdelo en el segundo paso

pt.name: Série de quebras de rota com freada seca
pt.description: Cones marcam pontos de quebra a 10 e 12 jardas para rotas comeback, dig e curl. O recebedor acelera cada stem em velocidade de rota, afunda os quadris ao entrar nos dois últimos passos e quebra seco no corte — peito sobre o joelho, cotovelo puxando para trás para acelerar o giro — e então explode plano para fora do corte até um ponto de recepção. Cada quebra é avaliada por contagem de passos e velocidade de saída. O exercício constrói o mecanismo de desaceleração-separação que converte velocidade linear em janelas abertas.
cues: Afunde na quebra — peito sobre o joelho
Puxe o cotovelo para trás para estalar o giro
Exploda plano — perca o marcador no segundo passo

biomechanics.force_vector: Sagittal Plane/Linear into violent Transverse redirection
friction_flags: ACL rotational shear on the snap-down plant
Patellar tendon eccentric spike entering the break
Eccentric hamstring loading during stem deceleration

youth_8_12.objective: Pattern the hip sink and two-step break at controlled speed
youth_8_12.prescription: 3 sets x 4 breaks (60% speed, curl only), full walk recovery

scholastic_13_15.objective: Run all three break families with consistent step counts and balanced exits
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 4 sets x 4 breaks rotating comeback-dig-curl (80% speed), 90 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Full-speed breaks with two-step snap-downs and immediate separation burst
high_school_16_18.prescription: 5 sets x 4 breaks at route speed with catch finish, full recovery between sets

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite break economy — timed exit velocity, randomized route calls, and defender shadow pressure
collegiate_pro.prescription: 6 sets x 4 breaks with route called mid-stem, laser-timed 5 m exit, trail-shadow defender on final 2 sets

en.name: Sled Drive Punch-and-Reset
en.description: From a three-point stance, the lineman fires out into a drive sled on the snap cadence, striking with double hands inside the frame — thumbs up, elbows tight — while rolling the hips through contact. The athlete drives the sled five yards with continuous leg churn, disengages, resets the stance, and repeats. Pad level is audited every rep: the spine stays neutral and the rise is earned through leg drive, not back extension. This is the foundational concentric power pattern of line play on both sides of the ball.
cues: Roll the hips through the punch
Thumbs up, elbows in — strike inside the frame
Feet never die — churn through the whistle

es.name: Empuje de trineo con golpe y reinicio
es.description: Desde una postura de tres puntos, el liniero dispara contra un trineo de empuje a la cadencia del snap, golpeando con ambas manos dentro del marco —pulgares arriba, codos pegados— mientras rueda las caderas a través del contacto. El atleta empuja el trineo cinco yardas con batido continuo de piernas, se desengancha, reinicia la postura y repite. El nivel de las hombreras se audita en cada repetición: la columna se mantiene neutra y la elevación se gana con el empuje de piernas, no con extensión lumbar. Este es el patrón fundamental de potencia concéntrica del juego de línea en ambos lados del balón.
cues: Rueda las caderas a través del golpe
Pulgares arriba, codos adentro — golpea dentro del marco
Los pies nunca mueren — bate hasta el silbato

pt.name: Empurrão de trenó com golpe e reinício
pt.description: A partir de uma postura de três pontos, o lineman dispara contra um trenó de empurrão na cadência do snap, golpeando com as duas mãos dentro do quadro — polegares para cima, cotovelos colados — enquanto rola os quadris através do contato. O atleta empurra o trenó por cinco jardas com batida contínua de pernas, desengaja, reinicia a postura e repete. O nível das ombreiras é auditado a cada repetição: a coluna permanece neutra e a subida é conquistada pelo empurrão das pernas, não pela extensão lombar. Este é o padrão fundamental de potência concêntrica do jogo de linha nos dois lados da bola.
cues: Role os quadris através do golpe
Polegares para cima, cotovelos dentro — golpeie dentro do quadro
Os pés nunca morrem — bata até o apito

biomechanics.force_vector: Sagittal Plane/Linear with low projection angle force application
friction_flags: Lumbar flexion-compression if pad level collapses
Shoulder and AC joint loading at strike impact
Wrist and hand jam stress on punch timing errors

youth_8_12.objective: Learn stance, snap-count fire-out, and hand placement on a light bag — no heavy sled
youth_8_12.prescription: 4 sets x 3 fire-outs to hand shield (no sled load), full recovery

scholastic_13_15.objective: Drive a light sled with neutral spine and synchronized punch timing
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 4 sets x 4 drives of 3 yards (light sled), 90 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Full-load sled drives with violent strike, sustained leg churn, and audited pad level
high_school_16_18.prescription: 5 sets x 4 drives of 5 yards (loaded sled), 1:4 work-to-rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite strike-to-drive power — resisted variance, reaction snap counts, and timed sled displacement
collegiate_pro.prescription: 6 sets x 4 drives with varied sled loading per set, randomized audio cadence, 5-yard displacement timed each rep

en.name: Mirror Pass-Set Kick-Slide
en.description: The offensive lineman sets in a two-point pass posture inside a five-yard alley while a rusher works unscripted lateral moves, speed feints, and inside counters. The lineman kick-slides to mirror, maintaining the half-man relationship — inside hand ready, weight balanced over mid-foot, never hopping or clicking the heels together. On a speed-to-power conversion the lineman sits and anchors; on an inside counter he replaces with a violent inside punch. The drill develops reactive lateral control under postural constraint, the defining athletic problem of pass protection.
cues: Slide — never hop — keep a screw in the ground
Stay square — half-man, inside hand loaded
Sit on the power, punch the counter

es.name: Kick-slide en espejo de pase
es.description: El liniero ofensivo se coloca en postura de pase de dos puntos dentro de un callejón de cinco yardas mientras un rusher trabaja movimientos laterales no guionados, amagues de velocidad y contras internas. El liniero realiza kick-slides para reflejarlo, manteniendo la relación de medio hombre —mano interna lista, peso equilibrado sobre el mediopié, sin saltar ni juntar los talones. Ante una conversión de velocidad a potencia, el liniero se asienta y ancla; ante una contra interna, responde con un golpe interno violento. El ejercicio desarrolla control lateral reactivo bajo restricción postural, el problema atlético definitorio de la protección de pase.
cues: Desliza — nunca saltes — mantén un tornillo en el suelo
Quédate cuadrado — medio hombre, mano interna cargada
Asiéntate contra la potencia, golpea la contra

pt.name: Kick-slide em espelho de passe
pt.description: O lineman ofensivo se posiciona em postura de passe de dois pontos dentro de um corredor de cinco jardas enquanto um rusher trabalha movimentos laterais não roteirizados, fintas de velocidade e counters internos. O lineman executa kick-slides para espelhá-lo, mantendo a relação de meio-homem — mão interna pronta, peso equilibrado sobre o mediopé, sem pular nem juntar os calcanhares. Em uma conversão de velocidade para potência, o lineman senta e ancora; em um counter interno, responde com um golpe interno violento. O exercício desenvolve controle lateral reativo sob restrição postural, o problema atlético definidor da proteção de passe.
cues: Deslize — nunca pule — mantenha um parafuso no chão
Fique quadrado — meio-homem, mão interna carregada
Sente contra a potência, golpeie o counter

biomechanics.force_vector: Frontal Plane/Lateral under continuous postural load
friction_flags: Adductor eccentric strain in deep kick-slide
Knee medial collapse under anchor against power
Ankle inversion stress on abrupt counter replacement

youth_8_12.objective: Learn the kick-slide footwork shape with balance — no rusher pressure
youth_8_12.prescription: 4 sets x 10 seconds shadow kick-slides each direction, 60 s rest

scholastic_13_15.objective: Mirror a scripted rusher while keeping half-man leverage and quiet feet
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 5 sets x 12 seconds versus scripted moves, 60 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Answer live unscripted rushes including speed-to-power and inside counters
high_school_16_18.prescription: 6 sets x 15 seconds live mirror with contact answers, 1:4 work-to-rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite protection latency — band-resisted slides, twin-move sequences, and graded anchor force
collegiate_pro.prescription: 8 sets x 15 seconds with hip-band resistance, mandatory two-move rush sequences, anchor force graded by coach or sensor

en.name: Backpedal Plant-and-Drive
en.description: The defender backpedals at controlled velocity with the nose over the toes and shoulders ahead of the hips. On the coach's ball flash, the athlete plants the back foot inside the body frame and drives downhill at a 45-degree angle through a marked catch point, finishing with a hand swipe through the ball line. The transition is the graded element: no false step, no rise out of the pedal, and full eccentric control of backward momentum before redirection. This is the signature deceleration-redirection demand of every coverage defender.
cues: Nose over toes in the pedal
Plant inside the frame — no false step
Drive through the upfield shoulder

es.name: Backpedal con planta y conducción
es.description: El defensor retrocede en backpedal a velocidad controlada con la nariz sobre los dedos de los pies y los hombros por delante de las caderas. Ante el destello del balón del entrenador, el atleta planta el pie trasero dentro del marco corporal y conduce cuesta abajo en un ángulo de 45 grados a través de un punto de recepción marcado, terminando con un manotazo a través de la línea del balón. La transición es el elemento calificado: sin paso en falso, sin elevarse del pedaleo y con control excéntrico total del impulso hacia atrás antes de la redirección. Esta es la exigencia distintiva de desaceleración y redirección de todo defensor de cobertura.
cues: Nariz sobre los dedos en el pedaleo
Planta dentro del marco — sin paso en falso
Conduce a través del hombro de campo arriba

pt.name: Backpedal com cravada e arrancada
pt.description: O defensor recua em backpedal em velocidade controlada com o nariz sobre os dedos dos pés e os ombros à frente dos quadris. Ao lampejo de bola do treinador, o atleta crava o pé de trás dentro do quadro corporal e arranca em descida num ângulo de 45 graus através de um ponto de recepção demarcado, finalizando com um tapa através da linha da bola. A transição é o elemento avaliado: sem passo em falso, sem subir do pedal e com controle excêntrico total do impulso para trás antes da redireção. Esta é a exigência característica de desaceleração e redireção de todo defensor de cobertura.
cues: Nariz sobre os dedos no pedal
Crave dentro do quadro — sem passo em falso
Arranque através do ombro de campo acima

biomechanics.force_vector: Sagittal Plane/Linear reversal with 45-degree redirection vector
friction_flags: Eccentric hamstring loading at pedal-to-drive transition
Patellar tendon spike on the plant step
Hip flexor strain on explosive downhill re-acceleration

youth_8_12.objective: Own backpedal posture and a clean single plant at low speed
youth_8_12.prescription: 4 reps x 10 m pedal with planned plant (50% speed), walk-back recovery

scholastic_13_15.objective: React to the ball flash with zero false steps at moderate pedal speed
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 6 reps x 10 m pedal with reactive flash (75% speed), 75 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Full-speed pedal-to-drive transitions finishing through the catch point
high_school_16_18.prescription: 8 reps x 12 m pedal at full speed with ball-line swipe finish, full recovery

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite transition burst — timed break windows, route-stem variance, and interception finish
collegiate_pro.prescription: 10 reps with laser-timed plant-to-5 m split, randomized flash direction and double-move stems, live interception finish on final 4 reps

en.name: Run-Pass Key Triangle Pursuit
en.description: Three cones form a five-yard triangle. The defender aligns at the apex reading a coach who presents keys: high hat sends the athlete into a pass drop to the back cone, low hat triggers a downhill fill to the front cone, and a directional point launches a scrape angle to the lateral cone, finishing with a leverage-correct form fit on a standing bag. Eyes process the key before the feet fire — slow eyes, fast feet. The drill encodes read-react discipline so pursuit angles are launched from information, not guesses.
cues: Slow eyes, fast feet on the key
Scrape square — never turn the shoulders early
Leverage the near hip on the fit

es.name: Persecución en triángulo con lectura de clave
es.description: Tres conos forman un triángulo de cinco yardas. El defensor se alinea en el vértice leyendo a un entrenador que presenta claves: hombreras altas envían al atleta a un drop de pase hacia el cono trasero, hombreras bajas activan un llenado cuesta abajo hacia el cono frontal, y un señalamiento direccional lanza un ángulo de persecución hacia el cono lateral, terminando con un ajuste de tackle con palanca correcta sobre un saco de pie. Los ojos procesan la clave antes de que los pies disparen: ojos lentos, pies rápidos. El ejercicio codifica la disciplina de leer y reaccionar para que los ángulos de persecución nazcan de información, no de adivinanzas.
cues: Ojos lentos, pies rápidos en la clave
Persigue cuadrado — nunca gires los hombros antes de tiempo
Apalanca la cadera cercana en el ajuste

pt.name: Perseguição em triângulo com leitura de chave
pt.description: Três cones formam um triângulo de cinco jardas. O defensor se alinha no vértice lendo um treinador que apresenta chaves: ombreiras altas mandam o atleta para um drop de passe até o cone de trás, ombreiras baixas disparam um preenchimento em descida até o cone da frente, e um apontar direcional lança um ângulo de perseguição até o cone lateral, finalizando com um encaixe de tackle com alavanca correta em um saco em pé. Os olhos processam a chave antes de os pés dispararem — olhos lentos, pés rápidos. O exercício codifica a disciplina de ler e reagir para que os ângulos de perseguição nasçam de informação, não de palpites.
cues: Olhos lentos, pés rápidos na chave
Persiga quadrado — nunca gire os ombros cedo demais
Alavanque o quadril próximo no encaixe

biomechanics.force_vector: Multi-planar with dominant Frontal scrape and Sagittal trigger vectors
friction_flags: Ankle inversion stress on lateral scrape plant
AC joint and shoulder load on bag fit
Hip flexor strain on false-key recovery bursts

youth_8_12.objective: Learn the three answers to the three keys at walk-through tempo — no contact fit
youth_8_12.prescription: 3 sets x 6 keys (50% speed, cone touch finish), 60 s rest

scholastic_13_15.objective: React to random keys with correct first steps and a light bag fit
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 4 sets x 6 random keys (75% speed), 60 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Full-speed triggers with leverage-correct fits and zero shoulder-turn leaks
high_school_16_18.prescription: 5 sets x 8 random keys at full speed with form fit, 1:3 work-to-rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite key-processing speed — disguised keys, play-action conflict reps, and reaction-time tracking
collegiate_pro.prescription: 6 sets x 8 keys with play-action and counter-key conflicts, reaction window timed by light gate or video frame count, full pursuit finish

en.name: Back-Line Run Timing Sprints
en.description: A cone gate marks the last defender's line. The forward holds a walking start position, reads a passer 25 m away, and times a curved run — arcing away from the line to stay onside — exploding into a 25-30 m sprint the instant the passer's head drops to strike a through-ball channel. The athlete must finish the sprint past the ball line, not decelerate at it. The drill welds offside discipline and curvilinear acceleration mechanics to the visual trigger strikers actually use in matches.
cues: Arc the run — stay onside off the shoulder
Go the instant the passer's head drops
Sprint through the gate, finish past the ball line

es.name: Sprints sincronizados a la espalda de la defensa
es.description: Una puerta de conos marca la línea del último defensor. El delantero mantiene una posición de inicio caminando, lee a un pasador a 25 m y sincroniza una carrera curva —arqueándose lejos de la línea para mantenerse habilitado— explotando en un sprint de 25-30 m en el instante en que la cabeza del pasador baja para golpear un canal de pase filtrado. El atleta debe terminar el sprint más allá de la línea del balón, no desacelerar en ella. El ejercicio fusiona la disciplina del fuera de juego y la mecánica de aceleración curvilínea con el disparador visual que los delanteros usan realmente en los partidos.
cues: Curva la carrera — habilitado sobre el hombro del defensor
Arranca en el instante en que baja la cabeza del pasador
Esprinta a través de la puerta, termina más allá de la línea del balón

pt.name: Sprints sincronizados nas costas da defesa
pt.description: Um portal de cones marca a linha do último defensor. O atacante mantém uma posição de início em caminhada, lê um passador a 25 m e sincroniza uma corrida curva — arqueando para longe da linha para permanecer onside — explodindo em um sprint de 25-30 m no instante em que a cabeça do passador baixa para bater um passe em profundidade. O atleta deve terminar o sprint além da linha da bola, não desacelerar nela. O exercício solda a disciplina do impedimento e a mecânica de aceleração curvilínea ao gatilho visual que os atacantes realmente usam nas partidas.
cues: Curve a corrida — onside sobre o ombro do defensor
Arranque no instante em que a cabeça do passador baixar
Acelere através do portal, termine além da linha da bola

biomechanics.force_vector: Sagittal Plane/Linear with curvilinear lean phase
friction_flags: Eccentric hamstring loading at top speed
Inside-leg adductor stress on curved arc
Calf-Achilles overload in repeated maximal starts

youth_8_12.objective: Learn the arc shape and the head-drop visual trigger at sub-maximal speed
youth_8_12.prescription: 4 reps x 15 m (60% speed), walk-back recovery

scholastic_13_15.objective: Time live triggers without breaking the offside gate early
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 6 reps x 20 m (80% speed) with live passer, 90 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Maximal-velocity timed runs finishing on a moving ball
high_school_16_18.prescription: 6 reps x 25-30 m at 95-100% with through-ball finish, 2-3 min recovery

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite run timing under contest — laser-timed splits, variable service, and a recovering defender
collegiate_pro.prescription: 8 reps x 30 m with laser timing at 10 and 30 m, randomized pass weight and channel, trailing recovery defender on final 3 reps

en.name: First-Touch Power Strike Sequence
en.description: The forward receives service with back to goal or on the half-turn, takes one preparation touch out of the body's shadow to set the strike angle, then delivers a full-intent finish to a marked corner target. The strike is coached as a rotational event: plant foot pointed at the target corner, hips whipping through contact, ankle locked, chest finishing over the ball. Reps alternate receiving surfaces and turn directions, building the receive-orient-strike chain that converts half-chances under defensive pressure.
cues: Touch out of your shadow — set the strike angle
Plant foot points at the target corner
Whip the hips — lock the ankle through contact

es.name: Secuencia de primer toque y remate de potencia
es.description: El delantero recibe el servicio de espaldas a la portería o en medio giro, da un toque de preparación fuera de la sombra del cuerpo para fijar el ángulo de remate, y luego ejecuta una definición a máxima intención hacia una esquina objetivo marcada. El remate se entrena como un evento rotacional: pie de apoyo apuntando a la esquina objetivo, caderas azotando a través del contacto, tobillo bloqueado, pecho terminando sobre el balón. Las repeticiones alternan superficies de recepción y direcciones de giro, construyendo la cadena recibir-orientar-rematar que convierte medias ocasiones bajo presión defensiva.
cues: Toque fuera de tu sombra — fija el ángulo de remate
El pie de apoyo apunta a la esquina objetivo
Azota las caderas — bloquea el tobillo en el contacto

pt.name: Sequência de primeiro toque e finalização de potência
pt.description: O atacante recebe o serviço de costas para o gol ou em meio-giro, dá um toque de preparação para fora da sombra do corpo para definir o ângulo da finalização, e então executa uma conclusão com intenção máxima em um canto-alvo demarcado. A finalização é treinada como um evento rotacional: pé de apoio apontado para o canto-alvo, quadris chicoteando através do contato, tornozelo travado, peito terminando sobre a bola. As repetições alternam superfícies de recepção e direções de giro, construindo a cadeia receber-orientar-finalizar que converte meias-chances sob pressão defensiva.
cues: Toque para fora da sua sombra — defina o ângulo da finalização
Pé de apoio aponta para o canto-alvo
Chicoteie os quadris — trave o tornozelo no contato

biomechanics.force_vector: Transverse Plane/Rotational through a Sagittal strike finish
friction_flags: Hip flexor and rectus femoris strain at maximal strike
Adductor loading on cross-body finishes
Plant-leg knee valgus stress during rotation

youth_8_12.objective: Clean prep touch and balanced strike shape at controlled intent
youth_8_12.prescription: 3 sets x 6 strikes (60% intent), full recovery between sets

scholastic_13_15.objective: Receive on the half-turn both directions with corner-target accuracy
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 4 sets x 6 strikes alternating turn direction (75% intent), 60 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Full-intent finishes from varied service under time constraint
high_school_16_18.prescription: 5 sets x 6 strikes at full intent on a two-touch limit, corner quota 3 of 6, 90 s rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite conversion craft — randomized service, passive-to-active pressure, and ball-speed tracking
collegiate_pro.prescription: 6 sets x 6 strikes with randomized aerial and ground service, closing defender on final 2 sets, radar-tracked ball speed with corner quota

en.name: Box-to-Box Tempo Grid with Scanning
en.description: Cones mark a 60 m box-to-box corridor with scan gates every 15 m and a 5 m gear-change zone at two-thirds distance. The midfielder runs continuous tempo repeats at controlled high pace, executing mandatory over-both-shoulders scans at every gate and a sharp change of pace through the gear zone without altering stride shape. The drill builds the aerobic repeatability that defines box-to-box engines while hard-wiring the scanning habit, so awareness survives fatigue instead of collapsing with it.
cues: Tall and springy — tempo is posture
Scan over both shoulders at every gate
Change gears, not your stride shape

es.name: Cuadrícula de tempo área a área con escaneo
es.description: Los conos marcan un corredor de 60 m de área a área con puertas de escaneo cada 15 m y una zona de cambio de marcha de 5 m a dos tercios de la distancia. El mediocampista corre repeticiones continuas de tempo a ritmo alto controlado, ejecutando escaneos obligatorios sobre ambos hombros en cada puerta y un cambio de ritmo seco en la zona de marcha sin alterar la forma de la zancada. El ejercicio construye la repetibilidad aeróbica que define a los motores de área a área mientras cablea el hábito de escanear, para que la conciencia de juego sobreviva a la fatiga en lugar de colapsar con ella.
cues: Erguido y elástico — el tempo es postura
Escanea sobre ambos hombros en cada puerta
Cambia de marcha, no la forma de tu zancada

pt.name: Grade de tempo área a área com escaneamento
pt.description: Cones marcam um corredor de 60 m de área a área com portais de escaneamento a cada 15 m e uma zona de troca de marcha de 5 m a dois terços da distância. O meio-campista corre repetições contínuas de tempo em ritmo alto controlado, executando escaneamentos obrigatórios sobre os dois ombros em cada portal e uma troca de ritmo seca na zona de marcha sem alterar a forma da passada. O exercício constrói a repetibilidade aeróbica que define os motores box-to-box enquanto fixa o hábito de escanear, para que a consciência de jogo sobreviva à fadiga em vez de desabar com ela.
cues: Alto e elástico — tempo é postura
Escaneie sobre os dois ombros em cada portal
Troque de marcha, não a forma da passada

biomechanics.force_vector: Sagittal Plane/Linear sustained submaximal cycling
friction_flags: Achilles and calf accumulation under repeat volume
Hamstring fatigue degradation in late repeats
Cervical rotation demand during scan-at-speed

youth_8_12.objective: Build continuous running rhythm with playful scan habits
youth_8_12.prescription: 2 sets x 6 minutes continuous grid (conversational pace), 2 min rest

scholastic_13_15.objective: Hold tempo pace across repeats with no missed scan gates
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 3 sets x 6 x 60 m tempo (75% pace), 30 s between reps, 2 min between sets

high_school_16_18.objective: Sustain match-realistic tempo and gear changes as fatigue accumulates
high_school_16_18.prescription: 4 sets x 6 x 60 m (85% pace) with gear-zone surges, 25 s between reps, 2 min between sets

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite aerobic repeatability — GPS-audited distance and speed targets with cognitive call-out overlay
collegiate_pro.prescription: 5 sets x 6 x 60 m at GPS-prescribed pace bands, coach number call-outs answered mid-rep at scan gates, heart-rate recovery tracked between sets

en.name: Half-Turn Receiving Gates
en.description: Four colored gates surround the midfielder in a 12 x 12 m grid. A server plays firm ground passes; before the ball arrives the athlete must scan, open the hips on the half-turn, and receive across the body with the far foot, killing the turn with the first touch and escaping through a called exit gate within two touches. Plant mechanics on the turn are coached explicitly — hips open before contact, weight over mid-foot. The drill converts the positional super-skill of receiving on the half-turn into a repeatable movement pattern.
cues: Open your hips before the ball arrives
Receive across the body with the far foot
First touch kills the turn, second touch escapes

es.name: Puertas de recepción en medio giro
es.description: Cuatro puertas de colores rodean al mediocampista en una cuadrícula de 12 x 12 m. Un servidor juega pases rasos firmes; antes de que llegue el balón, el atleta debe escanear, abrir las caderas en medio giro y recibir cruzado con el pie lejano, matando el giro con el primer toque y escapando por una puerta de salida cantada en un máximo de dos toques. La mecánica de apoyo en el giro se entrena explícitamente: caderas abiertas antes del contacto, peso sobre el mediopié. El ejercicio convierte la súper habilidad posicional de recibir en medio giro en un patrón de movimiento repetible.
cues: Abre las caderas antes de que llegue el balón
Recibe cruzado con el pie lejano
El primer toque mata el giro, el segundo escapa

pt.name: Portais de recepção em meio-giro
pt.description: Quatro portais coloridos cercam o meio-campista em uma grade de 12 x 12 m. Um servidor joga passes rasteiros firmes; antes de a bola chegar, o atleta deve escanear, abrir os quadris em meio-giro e receber cruzado com o pé distante, matando o giro com o primeiro toque e escapando por um portal de saída anunciado em no máximo dois toques. A mecânica de apoio no giro é treinada explicitamente — quadris abertos antes do contato, peso sobre o mediopé. O exercício converte a super-habilidade posicional de receber em meio-giro em um padrão de movimento repetível.
cues: Abra os quadris antes de a bola chegar
Receba cruzado com o pé distante
O primeiro toque mata o giro, o segundo escapa

biomechanics.force_vector: Transverse Plane/Rotational over a stable Frontal base
friction_flags: Plant-leg rotational shear on rushed turns
Adductor stress receiving across the body
Ankle inversion risk on off-balance exits

youth_8_12.objective: Learn the half-turn body shape and far-foot receiving habit
youth_8_12.prescription: 3 sets x 8 receptions (soft service, no exit call), 60 s rest

scholastic_13_15.objective: Scan before every reception and exit a called gate within two touches
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 4 sets x 8 receptions with live gate calls, 60 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Match-speed service with late gate calls and zero wasted touches
high_school_16_18.prescription: 5 sets x 10 receptions at firm pace with call after service, 1:2 work-to-rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite orientation under pressure — dual servers, color-conflict calls, and a pressing shadow defender
collegiate_pro.prescription: 6 sets x 10 receptions with two alternating servers, conflicting color-number call matrix, passive-to-active presser on final 2 sets

en.name: Recovery Sprint Brake-and-Jockey
en.description: The defender sprints a 20 m recovery line toward their own goal, then brakes in three progressive steps into a side-on jockey stance — knees soft, weight on the balls of the feet, body angled to show the attacker the touchline. From the stance, the athlete shadows a dribbler for 5 m, matching speed changes without lunging. The drill trains the eccentric braking and posture conversion that ends most defensive emergencies: arriving balanced is what makes the tackle or containment possible.
cues: Brake early, arrive balanced — never flat-footed
Side-on — show him the touchline
Little feet in the jockey — strike only on the heavy touch

es.name: Sprint de recuperación con frenado y jockey
es.description: El defensor esprinta una línea de recuperación de 20 m hacia su propia portería, luego frena en tres pasos progresivos hasta una postura de jockey de perfil: rodillas blandas, peso en los metatarsos, cuerpo angulado para mostrar al atacante la banda. Desde la postura, el atleta sombrea a un regateador durante 5 m, igualando los cambios de ritmo sin lanzarse. El ejercicio entrena el frenado excéntrico y la conversión de postura que resuelve la mayoría de las emergencias defensivas: llegar equilibrado es lo que hace posible la entrada o la contención.
cues: Frena temprano, llega equilibrado — nunca con pies planos
De perfil — muéstrale la banda
Pies cortos en el jockey — entra solo al toque largo

pt.name: Sprint de recuperação com freada e jockey
pt.description: O defensor acelera uma linha de recuperação de 20 m em direção ao próprio gol, depois freia em três passos progressivos até uma postura de jockey de perfil — joelhos macios, peso nos metatarsos, corpo angulado para mostrar a linha lateral ao atacante. A partir da postura, o atleta sombreia um driblador por 5 m, acompanhando as mudanças de ritmo sem se lançar. O exercício treina a frenagem excêntrica e a conversão de postura que resolve a maioria das emergências defensivas: chegar equilibrado é o que torna possível o desarme ou a contenção.
cues: Freie cedo, chegue equilibrado — nunca de pés chapados
De perfil — mostre a linha lateral a ele
Pés curtos no jockey — ataque só no toque longo

biomechanics.force_vector: Sagittal Plane/Linear braking into Frontal Plane/Lateral containment
friction_flags: Patellar tendon eccentric spike in the three-step brake
Eccentric hamstring loading at sprint termination
Groin strain risk in side-on lateral shuffles

youth_8_12.objective: Pattern the three-step brake and side-on stance from a jog
youth_8_12.prescription: 4 reps x 10 m (50% speed) into 5 s held jockey, walk-back recovery

scholastic_13_15.objective: Brake from striding speed and shadow a cooperative dribbler
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 6 reps x 15 m (75% speed) into 5 m shadow, 75 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Full recovery-sprint speed into balanced containment of a live dribbler
high_school_16_18.prescription: 8 reps x 20 m (95-100% speed) into live 5 m jockey, full recovery

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite emergency defending — timed brake windows, randomized entry angles, and 1v1 channel finish
collegiate_pro.prescription: 8 reps x 20 m with laser-timed 5 m brake zone, entry angle randomized left-right, live 1v1 channel duel finish on final 4 reps

en.name: Channel Deny 1v1 React
en.description: In a 5 x 15 m channel, the defender faces an attacker who may cut inside, push wide, or stop-start at will. The defender's task hierarchy is explicit: close the inside lane first, force the attacker toward the wide boundary, and win the recovery step the moment a cut is attempted. The athlete is coached to react off the attacker's hips rather than the ball, keeping a staggered stance that can redirect in either direction. The drill develops the reactive containment logic that separates positionally elite defenders from chasers.
cues: Close the inside hip — force the weak side
React off his hips, not the ball
Win the second step after his cut

es.name: Reacción 1v1 de negación de canal
es.description: En un canal de 5 x 15 m, el defensor enfrenta a un atacante que puede cortar hacia adentro, empujar hacia afuera o frenar y arrancar a voluntad. La jerarquía de tareas del defensor es explícita: cerrar primero el carril interior, forzar al atacante hacia el límite exterior y ganar el paso de recuperación en el momento en que se intente un recorte. Se entrena al atleta a reaccionar según las caderas del atacante y no según el balón, manteniendo una postura escalonada capaz de redirigir en cualquier dirección. El ejercicio desarrolla la lógica de contención reactiva que separa a los defensores posicionalmente élite de los perseguidores.
cues: Cierra la cadera interior — fuerza el lado débil
Reacciona a sus caderas, no al balón
Gana el segundo paso después de su recorte

pt.name: Reação 1v1 de negação de canal
pt.description: Em um canal de 5 x 15 m, o defensor enfrenta um atacante que pode cortar para dentro, empurrar para fora ou parar e arrancar à vontade. A hierarquia de tarefas do defensor é explícita: fechar primeiro o corredor interno, forçar o atacante para o limite externo e vencer o passo de recuperação no momento em que um corte for tentado. O atleta é treinado a reagir aos quadris do atacante e não à bola, mantendo uma base escalonada capaz de redirecionar para qualquer lado. O exercício desenvolve a lógica de contenção reativa que separa defensores posicionalmente de elite dos meros perseguidores.
cues: Feche o quadril interno — force o lado fraco
Reaja aos quadris dele, não à bola
Vença o segundo passo depois do corte dele

biomechanics.force_vector: Frontal Plane/Lateral with reactive Transverse redirections
friction_flags: ACL rotational shear on reactive redirections
High ankle inversion stress on boundary-side plants
Adductor eccentric strain in repeated lateral pushes

youth_8_12.objective: Learn channel positioning and hip-watching habits against scripted moves
youth_8_12.prescription: 4 sets x 12 seconds versus scripted attacker (50% intensity), 60 s rest

scholastic_13_15.objective: Contain a free attacker while holding inside-lane denial
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 5 sets x 15 seconds live 1v1 containment, 60 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Win recovery steps at match intensity with correct force angles
high_school_16_18.prescription: 6 sets x 15 seconds live 1v1 with scoring gates, 1:3 work-to-rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite duel craft — multi-attacker rotation, fatigue stacking, and duel-win analytics
collegiate_pro.prescription: 8 sets x 15 seconds against rotating fresh attackers, duel outcomes and recovery-step times logged, video review of hip-read latency

en.name: Collapse-Dive Color React Saves
en.description: The goalkeeper holds set position on a marked line while a server stands 8 m away with the ball. A coach calls or flashes a color mapped to low corner targets; the server strikes to that corner on a half-second delay. The keeper must stay set until the strike — still head, weight on the balls of the feet — then execute a collapse dive: near leg folding, lead hand tracing the grass, body behind the ball. Recovery to set position within two seconds completes the rep. The drill compresses save reaction latency while protecting dive technique under speed.
cues: Set before the strike — still head
Lead hand traces the grass on the collapse
Save, stand, square — reset in two seconds

es.name: Atajadas reactivas con caída por color
es.description: El portero mantiene la posición de set sobre una línea marcada mientras un servidor está a 8 m con el balón. Un entrenador canta o muestra un color asignado a las esquinas bajas; el servidor golpea a esa esquina con medio segundo de retraso. El portero debe permanecer en set hasta el golpeo —cabeza quieta, peso en los metatarsos— y luego ejecutar una caída lateral: la pierna cercana se pliega, la mano guía traza el césped, el cuerpo queda detrás del balón. La recuperación a posición de set en dos segundos completa la repetición. El ejercicio comprime la latencia de reacción de atajada mientras protege la técnica de caída bajo velocidad.
cues: Set antes del golpeo — cabeza quieta
La mano guía traza el césped en la caída
Ataja, levántate, cuadra — reinicia en dos segundos

pt.name: Defesas reativas com queda por cor
pt.description: O goleiro mantém a posição de set sobre uma linha demarcada enquanto um servidor fica a 8 m com a bola. Um treinador canta ou exibe uma cor mapeada para os cantos baixos; o servidor chuta naquele canto com meio segundo de atraso. O goleiro deve permanecer em set até o chute — cabeça parada, peso nos metatarsos — e então executar uma queda lateral: a perna próxima dobra, a mão-guia desliza pela grama, o corpo fica atrás da bola. A recuperação à posição de set em dois segundos completa a repetição. O exercício comprime a latência de reação de defesa enquanto protege a técnica de queda sob velocidade.
cues: Set antes do chute — cabeça parada
A mão-guia desliza pela grama na queda
Defenda, levante, enquadre — reinicie em dois segundos

biomechanics.force_vector: Frontal Plane/Lateral with downward collapse vector
friction_flags: Shoulder impact loading on repeated ground contact
Hip pointer and greater trochanter contusion risk
Wrist extension jam stress on lead-hand saves

youth_8_12.objective: Learn the collapse dive shape onto soft surface with thrown service
youth_8_12.prescription: 3 sets x 6 dives alternating sides (thrown balls, mat landing), 90 s rest

scholastic_13_15.objective: React to color calls with correct dive mechanics on grass
scholastic_13_15.prescription: 4 sets x 6 reactive dives (moderate strikes), 90 s rest

high_school_16_18.objective: Match-speed strikes with two-second recovery resets every rep
high_school_16_18.prescription: 5 sets x 6 dives at full strike pace with timed resets, 1:3 work-to-rest

collegiate_pro.objective: Elite save latency — dual-server deception, second-save chaos balls, and reaction-time capture
collegiate_pro.prescription: 6 sets x 6 dives with two servers and late color switches, mandatory second-save rebound ball each set, reaction window measured by frame count or light gate

en.name: Power-Step Lateral Extension Dives
en.description: From set position at the center of goal, the goalkeeper takes one explosive power side-step toward the post and launches into a full-extension dive at a high corner target served by volley or hand toss. The dive is a unilateral triple-extension event: the near leg loads and drives, the body flies on a rising diagonal, and the hands attack the far half of the ball at full reach. Landing is coached shoulder-to-hip, never on the elbow. This is the goalkeeper's signature expression of single-leg lateral power.
cues: Load the near leg — drive off one
Attack the far half of the ball at full reach
Land shoulder-to-hip — never on the elbow

es.name: Vuelos laterales con paso de potencia
es.description: Desde la posición de set en el centro de la portería, el portero da un paso lateral de potencia explosivo hacia el poste y se lanza en un vuelo de extensión completa hacia un objetivo de esquina alta servido de volea o con la mano. El vuelo es un evento de triple extensión unilateral: la pierna cercana carga y empuja, el cuerpo vuela en una diagonal ascendente y las manos atacan la mitad lejana del balón a máximo alcance. El aterrizaje se entrena de hombro a cadera, nunca sobre el codo. Esta es la expresión distintiva del portero de la potencia lateral a una pierna.
cues: Carga la pierna cercana — despega de una
Ataca la mitad lejana del balón a máximo alcance
Aterriza de hombro a cadera — nunca sobre el codo

pt.name: Voos laterais com passo de potência
pt.description: Da posição de set no centro do gol, o goleiro dá um passo lateral de potência explosivo em direção à trave e se lança em um voo de extensão completa até um alvo de canto alto servido de voleio ou arremesso de mão. O voo é um evento de tripla extensão unilateral: a perna próxima carrega e impulsiona, o corpo voa em uma diagonal ascendente e as mãos atacam a metade distante da bola em alcance máximo. A aterrissagem é treinada do ombro ao quadril, nunca sobre o cotovelo. Esta é a expressão característica do goleiro da potência lateral unipodal.
cues: Carregue a perna próxima — decole de uma só
